step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a heather grey oversized cropped sweatshirt over a black sports bra with the sports bra strap visible at the neckline, matching heather grey wide-leg sweat pants pooling slightly at her ankles, white slip-on sneakers, damp hair down with the front pieces twisted back loosely behind her ears, bare face, a single thin gold chain. She stands in a premium gym locker room, light wood lockers behind her, a long wooden bench in the foreground with a folded white gym towel and a small leather duffel bag on it, soft warm sconce lighting on the wall behind. Standing beside the bench, body angled three-quarters toward the camera, one foot slightly raised on the bench, looking down with a soft satisfied half-smile. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her left hand is raised tucking her damp hair behind her left ear, her right hand rests relaxed at her side. Warm sconce lighting from behind, soft overhead locker-room light, a gentle golden cast across the wood lockers. Shot on Sony A7IV 35mm lens shallow depth of field. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Post-shower satisfied end-of-workout calm mood, palette of warm wood, heather grey, cream towel, soft amber. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: Right hand at chest level, thumb on the front face of the box, index and middle fingers wrapping around the right side, ring and pinky tucked under the bottom edge, box held vertically with the long side oriented vertically and the front face turned to the camera.

Her body posture and arm angle will shift naturally from the relaxed at-side position to the chest-level holding pose.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — three-quarter waist-up framing with face mid-importance, default sufficient alongside the major outfit override (oversized layered sweats vs reference's tight white set) and warm locker-room scene.
